full_description: Place {A} into {B}; two blocks start lower and one starts upper.
schema: {a} denotes the arm that moves a block
preference: num of words should not exceed 18. Emphasize there are three blocks and the target plate is on the upper layer.
seen: Place {A} into {B}; two start lower and one starts upper.
Put {A} into {B} after collecting them from below and above.
Carry {A} into {B}, with two from below and one from above.
Transfer {A} into {B} from mixed lower and upper layers.
Pick every block and place {A} into {B}.
unseen: Place the full set of {A} into {B}.

seen: find one remaining block and grasp it
find the upper plate and place the block into it
unseen: place the block into the upper plate
